statement: In every magma, Equation 2521 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * z)) * x`) implies Equation 3232 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0549
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) z)) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) y) x)
